treatment_timeline.event: Patient hospitalized due to symptoms of left facial weakness
Repeat head CT scans showed no changes in the sign of the bleed
CT scan of the chest showed a small benign pulmonary nodule requiring follow-up
Abdominal CT showed evidence of previous external iliac vein thrombosis

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up CT scan of the chest in 6 months
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Bleeding likely due to amyloid angiopathy
